symptom_en: Upgrade process not started / FileNotFoundException: upgrade application not found
symptom_zh: 升级进程没启动 / FileNotFoundException
cause: UpgradeApp.exe not shipped with main application in first release
solution: Ensure UpgradeApp.exe is included in the publish directory from the first release
workaround: OSS mode: place Upgrade.exe in update/ subdirectory
keywords: upgrade not start, file not found, 升级没启动, FileNotFoundException, missing upgrade

symptom_en: Method not found exception at runtime
symptom_zh: 运行时 Method not found 异常
cause: Client and Upgrade projects use different GeneralUpdate NuGet versions
solution: Lock Client.csproj and Upgrade.csproj to the exact same NuGet version
workaround: Pin version in Directory.Build.props to enforce consistency
keywords: method not found, MissingMethodException, 方法找不到, NuGet conflict, version mismatch

symptom_en: BSOD / OutOfMemory / Process crash on differential patch
symptom_zh: 蓝屏/内存溢出/进程崩溃差分补丁
cause: BsdiffDiffer.WriteInt64 overflows on long.MinValue negation; control value > int.MaxValue truncates to negative
solution: Update to v10.4.6+ (#514 fixed). If cannot update: add MaxInputFileSize limit in differential engine
workaround: Limit patch file size at application level
keywords: BSOD, crash, OOM, differential, patch, 蓝屏, 崩溃, 内存溢出, BSDIFF

symptom_en: PathTooLongException during backup (recursive nesting)
symptom_zh: 备份递归嵌套 PathTooLongException
cause: StorageManager.Backup() creates backup dir INSIDE install path; empty SkipDirectorys list doesn't trigger default skip logic
solution: Set SkipDirectorys on Configinfo to exclude backup directories
workaround: Set SkipDirectorys to exclude '.backups','backup-'
keywords: path too long, backup recursion, PathTooLongException, 路径过长, 备份嵌套

symptom_en: IPC encryption key hardcoded / weak
symptom_zh: IPC 加密密钥硬编码/弱密钥
cause: Default IPC encryption key is a hardcoded string; AppSecretKey is reused as encryption key
solution: Use strong AppSecretKey (>= 32 chars, mixed case + numbers + symbols)
workaround: Rotate key periodically, audit encryption in IPC path
keywords: IPC encryption, hardcoded key, 加密, 硬编码, security, AppSecretKey

symptom_en: ZipSlip / path traversal in decompression
symptom_zh: ZIP 解压路径穿越漏洞
cause: CompressMiddleware.Extract doesn't validate ../ in zip entry paths against a whitelist before extraction
solution: Validate zip entry paths against target directory; reject entries with ../
workaround: Scan entry names before extraction for path traversal patterns
keywords: zip slip, path traversal, security, 解压漏洞, 目录穿越

symptom_en: Cross-tenant version leakage in multi-tenant deployment
symptom_zh: 多租户部署中跨租户版本泄露
cause: Server API returns version info without tenant isolation; ProductId not validated against tenant context
solution: Update server to validate ProductId against tenant context; add tenant-scoped API keys
workaround: Add tenant header validation middleware on server side
keywords: multi-tenant, cross-tenant, security, 多租户, 跨租户, ProductId

symptom_en: EventManager.Instance returned after Dispose
symptom_zh: EventManager.Dispose 后 Instance 仍可访问
cause: EventManager.Instance property returns the instance even after Dispose() is called
solution: Call Clear() first, then Dispose(); do not call Instance after Dispose
workaround: Wrap in try-finally; set to null after dispose
keywords: EventManager, dispose, singleton, memory leak, after dispose

symptom_en: Chinese text garbled on Linux/macOS
symptom_zh: Linux/macOS 中文乱码
cause: IPC file encoding defaults to system default, not UTF-8
solution: Set Encoding.UTF8 in PipelineContext and Configinfo
workaround: Always explicitly set Encoding.UTF8
keywords: Chinese garbled, encoding, UTF8, 乱码, 编码, Linux, macOS

symptom_en: Infinite update loop
symptom_zh: 无限升级循环
cause: manifest.json version number doesn't match actual installed version or write-back fails
solution: Ensure manifest.json version number is correct; implement write-back after update
workaround: Add version write-back logic after successful update
keywords: infinite loop, 死循环, version mismatch, manifest

symptom_en: MultiDownloadCompletedEventArgs.IsComplated typo causes binding failure
symptom_zh: MultiDownloadCompletedEventArgs.IsComplated 拼写错误导致绑定失败
cause: v10.4.6 API has typo IsComplated (not IsCompleted). UI bindings using correct spelling get null
solution: Use IsComplated in code; or write a wrapper property that redirects to IsComplated
workaround: Wrap in adapter class with IsCompleted alias
keywords: IsComplated, IsCompleted, typo, spelling, binding, 拼写错误

symptom_en: OSS mode doesn't distinguish Main vs Upgrade update packages
symptom_zh: OSS 模式不区分 Main/Upgrade 更新包
cause: OSS strategy treats all packages the same; no MainOnly/UpgradeOnly differentiation
solution: Accept this behavior for OSS; upgrade to standard server strategy if you need fine-grained control
workaround: Use standard server strategy if Main/Upgrade differentiation is needed
keywords: OSS, MainOnly, UpgradeOnly, 不区分, OSS 策略

symptom_en: Upgrade.exe must be in update/ subdirectory for OSS
symptom_zh: OSS 模式下 Upgrade.exe 必须在 update/ 子目录
cause: OSS strategy scans update/ directory; placing Upgrade.exe elsewhere won't be found
solution: Place Upgrade.exe in update/ subdirectory from the first release
workaround: Verify directory structure before first OSS deployment
keywords: OSS, update directory, subdirectory, 子目录, OSS 部署

symptom_en: EventManager concurrency race on add/remove/dispatch
symptom_zh: EventManager 并发竞争问题
cause: EventManager uses List<> not concurrent collection; add/remove during dispatch causes race
solution: Use lock or ConcurrentBag for listener storage
workaround: Avoid modifying listeners while dispatch is in progress
keywords: concurrency, EventManager, thread safe, 并发, 线程安全

symptom_en: Container (IoC) disposed entry can cause ObjectDisposedException
symptom_zh: 容器释放后访问导致 ObjectDisposedException
cause: AutoFac container holds singleton references; after disposal access to Instance throws
solution: Check container.IsDisposed before accessing Instance; add null check wrapper
workaround: Wrap container access in try-catch (ObjectDisposedException)
keywords: container, disposed, ObjectDisposedException, IoC, AutoFac

symptom_en: Cross-version (CVP) jump skips API compatibility checks
symptom_zh: 跨版本跳转跳过 API 兼容性检查
cause: CVP strategy allows jumping arbitrary number of versions; no intermediate API compatibility validation
solution: Ensure server-side compatibility validation between source and target versions
workaround: Test API compatibility for each version pair before deployment
keywords: CVP, cross version, API compatibility, 跨版本, API 兼容

symptom_en: Linux: Pipeline hash algorithm platform-specific differences
symptom_zh: Linux 上哈希算法平台差异
cause: HashMiddleware may use platform-specific crypto implementations; hash mismatch between build and deploy
solution: Use cross-platform hash algorithm (SHA256 consistently)
workaround: Set HashAlgorithmName explicitly to SHA256
keywords: Linux, hash, SHA256, 哈希, 平台差异

symptom_en: SignalR HubConnection dispose-then-reconnect crash
symptom_zh: SignalR HubConnection 释放后重连崩溃
cause: HubConnection.Dispose() sets internal state; reconnecting without new instance crashes
solution: Set HubConnection to null after Dispose; create new instance for reconnect
workaround: Always null-check before reconnecting
keywords: SignalR, HubConnection, reconnect, 重连, 推送

symptom_en: Bowl v10.4.6 has no public LaunchAsync method
symptom_zh: Bowl v10.4.6 无公开 LaunchAsync 方法
cause: v10.4.6 Bowl class only provides base type definitions; LaunchAsync is not publicly exposed
solution: Use Bowl with v10.5.0+ dev branch; in v10.4.6 only basic type definitions are available
workaround: Bowl parameters can be configured but execution requires dev branch
keywords: Bowl, LaunchAsync, 崩溃守护, 守护进程

symptom_en: Differential package referenced unnecessarily
symptom_zh: 不必要地引用了 Differential 包
cause: Developers add GeneralUpdate.Differential package not knowing types are already in Core
solution: Don't add GeneralUpdate.Differential separately; the types are embedded in GeneralUpdate.Core
workaround: Remove any existing GeneralUpdate.Differential reference from csproj
keywords: Differential, NuGet, 差分, 额外引用

symptom_en: Wrong EventArgs type used in event listeners
symptom_zh: 事件监听到用了错误的 EventArgs 类型
cause: Using ProgressEventArgs instead of MultiDownloadStatisticsEventArgs or vice versa
solution: Use exact EventArgs type from GeneralUpdate.Common.Download namespace
workaround: Always check the namespace before importing event args types
keywords: event args, EventArgs, 事件参数, 错误类型

symptom_en: Missing AddListenerException leads to silent failures
symptom_zh: 未订阅 ExceptionEventArgs 导致静默失败
cause: Without AddListenerException, non-critical exceptions are silently swallowed
solution: Always add AddListenerException handler; at minimum log the exception message
workaround: Add a default handler that logs to file even in production
keywords: silent failure, exception, 静默失败, 未订阅

symptom_en: Version number not 4-segment (x.y.z.w)
symptom_zh: 版本号不是 4 段式
cause: Server or client uses 3-segment version (1.0.0); comparison logic expects 4 segments
solution: Always use 4-segment version format: x.y.z.w
workaround: Pad to 4 segments at server response level
keywords: version, 4 segment, 版本号, 三段式

symptom_en: InstallPath set to relative path causes file resolution failure
symptom_zh: InstallPath 使用相对路径导致文件解析失败
cause: Relative InstallPath resolved differently in Client vs Upgrade context
solution: Use absolute path: AppDomain.CurrentDomain.BaseDirectory for production
workaround: Use Path.GetFullPath() to resolve at runtime
keywords: InstallPath, relative path, 相对路径, 安装路径

symptom_en: UpdateUrl returns success but empty body causes null reference
symptom_zh: UpdateUrl 返回成功但空响应体导致空引用
cause: Server API returns 200 OK with null/empty body; bootstrap doesn't handle null Info.Body
solution: Add null check on e.Info?.Body before iterating VersionInfo list
workaround: Wrap version list access in null-conditional operator
keywords: null reference, empty response, 空响应, 空引用, body null

symptom_en: Version comparison uses string instead of semantic version
symptom_zh: 版本比较使用字符串而非语义版本
cause: Version strings compared lexicographically (1.9.0.0 > 1.10.0.0)
solution: Use Version class (System.Version) or a semantic version parser for comparison
workaround: Cast to System.Version before comparison
keywords: version compare, semantic version, 版本比较, 语义版本

symptom_en: BlackFiles/BlackFormats patterns not applied to upgrade directory
symptom_zh: 黑名单模式未应用到升级目录
cause: BlackFiles patterns only apply to main app directory; upgrade path files not filtered
solution: Apply same blacklist logic to upgrade directory; or use separate upgrade-specific blacklist
workaround: Duplicate blacklist entries for both main and upgrade paths
keywords: blacklist, BlackFiles, 黑名单, 升级目录

symptom_en: Update process killed due to watchdog timeout on slow operations
symptom_zh: 慢操作导致升级进程被监控超时杀死
cause: Upgrade process has a hard timeout; large file operations exceed the limit
solution: Increase timeout for large updates; show progress to watchdog; split large operations
workaround: Show periodic progress to prevent watchdog timeout
keywords: timeout, watchdog, killed, 超时, 被杀

symptom_en: Single-process mode not supported in v10.4.6
symptom_zh: v10.4.6 不支持单进程模式
cause: Developers expect to run update in same process; v10.4.6 requires dual-process architecture
solution: Accept dual-process requirement; document that single-process is not supported
workaround: Not supported in v10.4.6; consider v10.5.0+ for single-process
keywords: single process, 单进程, dual process, 双进程

symptom_en: SignalR push update delivery not acknowledged
symptom_zh: SignalR 推送更新无送达确认
cause: Push notification sent but no acknowledgment; client may miss the update while offline
solution: Implement client-side acknowledgment; use retry queue on server for unacknowledged pushes
workaround: Add ACK from client; server retries unacknowledged pushes
keywords: SignalR, acknowledgment, 推送确认, 送达

symptom_en: Pre-release version included in production update list
symptom_zh: 预发布版本被包含在生产更新列表中
cause: Server returns pre-release/beta versions in the production version list; client updates to wrong version
solution: Filter versions by release channel; separate pre-release and production version lists
workaround: Add release channel field to version metadata
keywords: pre-release, beta, 预发布, 测试版本

symptom_en: OssClient.AppType value 3-4 not supported in v10.4.6
symptom_zh: v10.4.6 不支持 OssClient.AppType（值 3-4）
cause: v10.4.6 only supports AppType values 1 (Client) and 2 (Upgrade); 3-4 are dev-branch only
solution: Use AppType.ClientApp (1) or AppType.UpgradeApp (2) only
workaround: Avoid values 3-4 in v10.4.6
keywords: OssClient, AppType, 3-4, not supported, 不支持

symptom_en: ProgressEventArgs used in v10.4.6 API where MultiDownload* expected
symptom_zh: ProgressEventArgs 与 MultiDownload* 混淆
cause: v10.4.6 uses MultiDownload* events for batch downloads; ProgressEventArgs is for single download only
solution: Use MultiDownloadStatisticsEventArgs for batch download; ProgressEventArgs for single file
workaround: Check event type before using in v10.4.6
keywords: progress, event, 进度事件, 混淆

symptom_en: Custom pipeline middleware order wrong causes silent failure
symptom_zh: 自定义中间件顺序错误导致静默失败
cause: Middleware registered in wrong order (Patch before Compress); no error but update silently broken
solution: Follow correct order: Hash -> Compress -> Patch -> Drivelution
workaround: Document and verify middleware order
keywords: pipeline, middleware order, 管道, 中间件顺序

symptom_en: ConfigurationProviderFactory.Providers dictionary not thread-safe
symptom_zh: ConfigurationProviderFactory.Providers 字典非线程安全
cause: Dictionary used without synchronization; concurrent access in multi-threaded context may corrupt
solution: Use ConcurrentDictionary or external lock for Providers access
workaround: Replace Dictionary with ConcurrentDictionary
keywords: thread safety, ConfigurationProviderFactory, 线程安全

symptom_en: Socket/HttpClient not disposed after download completes
symptom_zh: 下载完成后 Socket/HttpClient 未释放
cause: HttpClient instances created per request without reuse or disposal
solution: Use singleton HttpClient; or wrap in using block
workaround: Configure HttpClient as singleton in DI container
keywords: HttpClient, socket leak, 连接泄漏, 未释放

symptom_en: LaunchAsync() returns Task<GeneralUpdateBootstrap> not Task<bool>
symptom_zh: LaunchAsync() 返回 Task<GeneralUpdateBootstrap> 而非 Task<bool>
cause: Developers expect bool return type for success/failure check; actual return is Bootstrap instance
solution: The returned Bootstrap instance can be inspected; do not expect bool
workaround: Ignore return value; use event listeners for status
keywords: LaunchAsync, return type, Task, 返回值

symptom_en: Silent mode notifications don't respect Do Not Disturb settings
symptom_zh: 静默模式通知不遵守免打扰设置
cause: Silent update notifications pop up even when system is in DND or presentation mode
solution: Check system DND status before showing notifications; queue notifications for later
workaround: Use OS-level DND API before showing notification
keywords: silent, notification, DND, 通知, 免打扰

symptom_en: Service mode (Windows Service) IPC path resolution difference
symptom_zh: Windows 服务模式下 IPC 路径解析差异
cause: Windows Services run with different working directory than user apps; IPC file path resolved incorrectly
solution: Use absolute paths for IPC files; ensure service account has write access to IPC directory
workaround: Always use full absolute path for IPC file
keywords: Windows Service, IPC, path, 服务, 路径

symptom_en: Thread.Sleep in event listener blocks update pipeline
symptom_zh: 事件监听中使用 Thread.Sleep 阻塞更新管道
cause: Synchronous waits in event handlers block the pipeline execution
solution: Use async event handlers; avoid Thread.Sleep/Task.Wait in any event listener
workaround: Replace Sleep with Task.Delay and async pattern
keywords: block, sleep, 阻塞, 事件监听

symptom_en: Hardcoded temporary path in unzip operations
symptom_zh: 解压操作中硬编码临时路径
cause: CompressMiddleware uses hardcoded temp path; conflicts with system temp policy
solution: Use Path.GetTempPath() or configurable temp directory
workaround: Override via environment variable if needed
keywords: temp path, hardcoded, 临时路径, 硬编码

symptom_en: Differential clean/dirty parameter validation missing
symptom_zh: 差分 clean/dirty 参数缺失验证
cause: DifferentialCore.CleanAsync/Core.DirtyAsync doesn't validate input paths
solution: Validate source/target/patch directories exist before calling
workaround: Add manual directory existence checks
keywords: differential, parameter validation, 差分, 参数校验

symptom_en: ServiceCollection registration not validated before Build
symptom_zh: Build 前 ServiceCollection 注册未验证
cause: Multiple registrations of same type; last wins silently
solution: Use TryAdd instead of Add for service registration to detect duplicates
workaround: Replace Add with TryAdd patterns
keywords: DI, registration, duplicate, ServiceCollection

symptom_en: Process memory tracking via private bytes not working-memory
symptom_zh: 进程内存跟踪使用 private bytes 而非 working set
cause: Private bytes doesn't reflect actual memory pressure; working set is more meaningful for GC pressure
solution: Use WorkingSet64 instead of PrivateMemorySize64 for memory monitoring
workaround: Switch to WorkingSet64 for memory threshold monitoring
keywords: memory, private bytes, working set, 内存跟踪

symptom_en: Drivelution middleware exception loses context
symptom_zh: Drivelution 中间件异常丢失上下文
cause: Driver installation failure exception is caught without original stack trace or driver name
solution: Wrap exception with driver name and operation context before rethrowing
workaround: Log driver name and operation at entry point
keywords: Drivelution, exception, 驱动, 异常

symptom_en: OSS container/region info hardcoded in example code
symptom_zh: OSS 示例代码中硬编码了容器/区域信息
cause: Sample code uses hardcoded OSS endpoint/bucket values; needs env-based configuration
solution: Use environment variables or config file for OSS endpoint and bucket
workaround: Extract OSS config to environment variables
keywords: OSS, hardcoded, 硬编码, 示例, endpoint

symptom_en: SkipDirectorys empty list doesn't use defaults
symptom_zh: SkipDirectorys 空列表不使用默认值
cause: Empty SkipDirectorys list skips nothing; default skip patterns not applied
solution: Set SkipDirectorys explicitly even if using default patterns
workaround: Always set SkipDirectorys with at least basic patterns
keywords: SkipDirectorys, empty list, 跳过目录, 空列表

symptom_en: Bowl process name may match multiple processes
symptom_zh: Bowl 进程名可能匹配多个进程
cause: ProcessNameOrId uses string match; multiple processes with same name monitored instead of one
solution: Use PID instead of process name for Bowl monitoring, or use full path
workaround: Use exact process name with extension (MyApp.exe) to narrow match
keywords: Bowl, process name, multiple, 多个进程

symptom_en: Linux: missing chmod +x on downloaded UpgradeApp
symptom_zh: Linux 上下载的 UpgradeApp 缺少执行权限
cause: File permissions not set after download; no IUpdateHooks in v10.4.6 to fix it
solution: Manually chmod +x after download, or use post-update script
workaround: Add chmod command to deployment script
keywords: Linux, chmod, permission, 权限, 执行

symptom_en: WinForms: ShowDialog in update event blocks IPC
symptom_zh: WinForms ShowDialog 阻塞 IPC 通信
cause: Modal dialog shown during update event blocks the IPC writing thread
solution: Use non-modal forms or async dialog patterns
workaround: Replace ShowDialog with Show + event-based close
keywords: WinForms, ShowDialog, IPC, 模态框

symptom_en: VersionRespDTO nullable fields cause null warnings
symptom_zh: VersionRespDTO 可空字段导致空警告
cause: Some fields in VersionRespDTO are nullable; no null handling in consuming code
solution: Add null coalescing operators (??) when accessing VersionRespDTO properties
workaround: Use pattern matching before accessing nullable fields
keywords: nullable, 可空, null warning, VersionInfo
